---
title: "Project1Checkpoint3"
author: "Sophia Woodard"
format: html
editor: source
embed-resources: true
code-tools: true
execute: 
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
democracy_data <- readr::read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2024/2024-11-05/democracy_data.csv')
library(tidyverse)
library(gt)
```

## Data Sources

### #1

```{r}

```

Descript Here

### #2

```{r}

```

**Description Here: GDP  data explanation**

## Data Summaries

### #1

### #2
